title: Black Bombardment
description: Call in airstrikes, ride a bomber plane, and unleash tactical destruction — from light explosives to nuclear obliteration. All from a single briefcase.
body:
# 💣 Black Bombardment

**Open the briefcase. Pick your target. Watch the world burn.**

Black Bombardment adds a full tactical airstrike system to Minecraft — 
complete with a command console, a rideable bomber plane, an armored limo, 
and five escalating bomb types that range from surgical strikes to total annihilation.

---

## ✈️ Features

### 🧳 Bomb Briefcase Console
Place the **Bomb Briefcase** block, open its map interface, and click any 
coordinate to lock on a target. Choose your bomb type, set your explosion 
radius, and hit **Bombard** — then watch the sky do the rest.

### 💥 5 Bomb Types
| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| **Light** | Quick, precise strike — minimal collateral damage |
| **Mortar** | Mid-range blast with solid area coverage |
| **Heavy** | Massive explosion for serious destruction |
| **Obliterator** | Leaves nothing standing |
| **☢️ Nuclear** | The last word in firepower |

### 🛩️ Pyramid Bomber Plane
Spawn and ride the **Pyramid Bomber** — a fully modeled aircraft entity. 
Use keybinds to **drop bombs** and **cycle bomb types** mid-flight for 
precise aerial bombardment.

### 🚗 Armored Limo
Roll up in style with the **Armored Limo** — a drivable vehicle with its 
own storage trunk. Built for warzone logistics (and looking good doing it).

### 🪖 Pilot Bomber
The **Pilot Bomber** entity accompanies your aircraft operations. 
A proper crew for a proper air assault.

---

## 📦 Items & Blocks
- 🧳 **Bomb Briefcase** — Deployable airstrike console
- ✈️ **Armored Limo** — Drivable vehicle with storage
- 🪖 **Pilot Bomber** — Crew entity item
- ⚾ **Baseball** — Throwable projectile
- 🍬 **Gum** — Craftable from smelted dirt

---

## ⚙️ Requirements
- **Minecraft:** 1.20.1
- **Mod Loader:** Forge 47+
- No additional dependencies required

---

*Black Bombardment is a standalone mod — no bloated dependency chains, 
just pure explosive gameplay.*
